/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/solver_mumps.dir/src/mumps/main_mumps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_mumps.dir/src/mumps/mumps_solver.cpp.o -o solver_mumps  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib libsolver_common.a -L/home/xydint/SparseBenchmark/mumps_local/lib -ldmumps -lmumps_common -lpord -lscalapack-openmpi -llapack -lopenblas -lmetis -lmpi_mpifh -lgfortran -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
